name: @open-design/ui
description: Shared React UI primitives (Tailwind-based) used by both apps/desktop (Electron renderer) and apps/web (Next.js). Source-only: entrypoints point straight at src so each app's bundler compiles the TSX and — crucially — each app's Tailwind v4 scanner sees the class names directly (no prebuilt dist that would hide them from purge). Components carry no styles of their own beyond Tailwind utilities resolved against the shared design-tokens palette.
//note-entrypoints: Top-level main/module/types mirror the exports map because apps/desktop's tsconfig uses moduleResolution:'node' (Node10), which ignores `exports` and only reads these legacy fields. apps/web (moduleResolution:'bundler') reads `exports`. Both point at the TS source — no dist.
